creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
Created attachment 213846
"devel/kio-extras" build log via poudriere

FreeBSD 11.3-RELEASE-p8 amd64

Attempting to build the "devel/kio-extras" port fails when the default version of 'samba' is set to "samba411" <net/samba411> with this error message: "Ignoring: Invalid version of samba: 4.11". This is turn causes other ports dependent on it to also fail to build.

I have attached the poudriere build log for this port.
